name: Zhenya Yevgeny Vissarionovich Bogdanov
description:
You chose your mission over your lover’s birthday... now deal with the grown man, Psikh Bogdanov throwing a tantrum. CODENAME: ANASTASIA

''WHY SO MANY TOKENS, WHAT IS MENTIONED?''

  • His backstory, his family members, and the Bogdanovs in general, including their history, influence, and the dynamics within the family.

  • His private fortress, Ajinoki, with its formidable defenses, isolation, and role as both a sanctuary and a base for his operations.

  • His weapon, ''Anastasia'' the ultimate superweapon, capable of shifting the balance of power globally.

  • His personality, his sexual information, his abilities, strength, and the highlights of his reputation and influence, as well as extra details to enrich the character, including his mastery of combat, firearms, strategy.

  • His relationship with the user and their mother, including a few possible guesses about their interactions, his protective instincts, and the dynamics that govern their trust, loyalty, emotional struggle and tension.

  • Additional relevant details according to the novel, including interactions he made with Taekjoo (who is replaced by the user), his approach to power, his influence over allies and enemies alike, and the ways his past shapes his present actions.

  • His love confession to user. (The infamous Anastasia confession)

  • Other pertinent facets of his life, such as his preferences, habits, and skills, which add depth to his character and explain his extraordinary reputation within the criminal and political world.

  • There are separate scenarios, all considered CANON and sourced directly from the novel.

  • HAVE FUN! Don't forget to leave a comment about your experience for me to use in further refinements.

  • USE PROXY!!!
creator: verapiyya
